div.p: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

tr.td:
Rotavirus dose 1: Provision of the rotavirus first dose Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: WHO recommends that the first dose of rotavirus vaccine be administered as soon as possible after 6 weeks of age.
If:
Applicability:
Rotavirus dose 1
(Rotavirus dose 1)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Rotavirus dose 1 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

Rotavirus dose 2: Provision of the rotavirus second dose Trigger event: First rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines" Create condition: A minimum interval of 4 weeks should be maintained between doses.
If:
Applicability:
Rotavirus dose 2
(Rotavirus dose 2)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Rotavirus dose 2 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

Rotavirus dose 3: Provision of a rotavirus third dose Trigger event: For a series containing more than two doses, two rotavirus primary series doses of mixed series or a series with unknown vaccine products were administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines"and "Type of dose" = "Primary series" ) = 2 AND "Vaccine brand" (where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines" AND "Dose number" = 1) ≠ "Vaccine brand" (where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines" AND "Dose number" = 2) OR "Total doses in series" > 2 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines" Create condition: For a mixed series or a series with any unknown vaccine products, a total of 3 doses of rotavirus vaccine should be administered for a complete vaccination series. RotaTeq, Rotavac and Rotasiil should be administered in a 3-dose schedule.
If:
Applicability:
Rotavirus dose 3
(Rotavirus dose 3)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Rotavirus dose 3 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

valueString.value: Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": [Immunization] I where I.status = 'completed' and I.isSubpotent is not true
Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
Rotavirus Doses Administered to Patient

/* @internal: Rotavirus containing Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Rotavirus Doses Administered to Patient": Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Rotavirus vaccines"
Rotavirus Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Rotavirus Primary Series Doses Administered
Two rotavirus primary series doses were administered
Second rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered
Brand of First Dose
Brand of Second Dose
The series administered to the client contains the same product
The series administered to the client is a mixed series or a series with unknown vaccine products
The series contain more than two doses
Rotavirus dose 3 Expiration
Three rotavirus primary series doses were administered
Third rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered
Rotavirus dose 3
Date of Latest Rotavirus Dose
Rotavirus dose 3 Due Date
Rotavirus dose 3 Create

/* @output: Rotavirus dose 3 Create @create: For a mixed series or a series with any unknown vaccine products, a total of 3 doses of rotavirus vaccine should be administered for a complete vaccination series. RotaTeq, Rotavac and Rotasiil should be administered in a 3-dose schedule. */ define "Rotavirus dose 3 Create": if "Rotavirus dose 3" then 'For a mixed series or a series with any unknown vaccine products, a total of 3 doses of rotavirus vaccine should be administered for a complete vaccination series. RotaTeq, Rotavac and Rotasiil should be administered in a 3-dose schedule.' + ' Due Date: ' + ToString("Rotavirus dose 3 Due Date") + ' Expiration: ' + ToString("Rotavirus dose 3 Expiration") else ''
No rotavirus primary series doses were administered
Rotavirus dose 1 Expiration
One rotavirus primary series dose was administered
First rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered
Rotavirus dose 1
Rotavirus dose 1 Due Date
Rotavirus dose 1 Create
Rotavirus dose 2 Expiration
Rotavirus dose 2
Rotavirus dose 2 Due Date
Rotavirus dose 2 Create

/** * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series */ define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
define function ToString(value string): value.value
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept): if concept is null then null else System.Concept { codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C), display: concept.text.value }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding): if coding is null then null else System.Code { code: coding.code.value, system: coding.system.value, version: coding.version.value, display: coding.display.value }

/** * @description: Gets the type of antigen dose extension value from an Immunization */ define fluent function brand(immz Immunization): (First( immz.extension E where E.url = 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/StructureDefinition/IMMZVaccineBrand' )).value as FHIR.CodeableConcept
define function ToString(value uri): value.value

/** * @description: Gets a given immunization from a list that matches the dose number */ define fluent function getDose(immunizations List<Immunization>, doseNumber String): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.doseNumber = doseNumber )

/** * @description: Gets the series doses from an immunization */ define fluent function seriesDoses(immunization Immunization): First(immunization.protocolApplied pa where pa.seriesDoses is not null).seriesDoses
define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>): Last( immunizations I sort by start of occurrence.toInterval() )
define function ToDate(value date): value.value

citation.value: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

description.value: Provision of the rotavirus first dose Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: WHO recommends that the first dose of rotavirus vaccine be administered as soon as possible after 6 weeks of age.

Provision of the rotavirus second dose Trigger event: First rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines" Create condition: A minimum interval of 4 weeks should be maintained between doses.

Provision of a rotavirus third dose Trigger event: For a series containing more than two doses, two rotavirus primary series doses of mixed series or a series with unknown vaccine products were administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines"and "Type of dose" = "Primary series" ) = 2 AND "Vaccine brand" (where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines" AND "Dose number" = 1) ≠ "Vaccine brand" (where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines" AND "Dose number" = 2) OR "Total doses in series" > 2 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" where "Vaccine type" = "Rotavirus vaccines" Create condition: For a mixed series or a series with any unknown vaccine products, a total of 3 doses of rotavirus vaccine should be administered for a complete vaccination series. RotaTeq, Rotavac and Rotasiil should be administered in a 3-dose schedule.
